description: A nurse wants to check the status of their state nursing license online.

nodes.task_description: Gather the nurse's name and license number.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the information needed to search the database.

nodes.task_description: Search the state's professional licensing database.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully retrieves the license record.

nodes.task_description: Provide the status of the license, including its expiration date.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent informs the nurse that their license is active and provides the expiration date.
